ddls:
CREATE TABLE "precipitation_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "start_datetime" TEXT /* Start datetime of the data collection period */,
  "end_datetime" TEXT /* End datetime of the data collection period */,
  "primary_precip_bulk" REAL /* Bulk primary precipitation measurement */,
  "primary_precip_num_pts" INTEGER /* Number of points used in the primary precipitation measurement */,
  "primary_precip_exp_uncert" REAL /* Expected uncertainty of the primary precipitation measurement */,
  "primary_precip_final_qf" INTEGER /* Final quality flag for the primary precipitation measurement */,
  "secondary_precip_bulk" REAL /* Bulk secondary precipitation measurement */,
  "secondary_precip_num_pts" INTEGER /* Number of points used in the secondary precipitation measurement */,
  "secondary_precip_exp_uncert" REAL /* Expected uncertainty of the secondary precipitation measurement */,
  "secondary_precip_final_qf" INTEGER /* Final quality flag for the secondary precipitation measurement */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data point */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_data_primary_precip_final_qf FOREIGN KEY ("primary_precip_final_qf") REFERENCES data_quality_flags ("qf_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_data_secondary_precip_final_qf FOREIGN KEY ("secondary_precip_final_qf") REFERENCES data_quality_flags ("qf_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the station collects data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_flags" (
  "qf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality flag */,
  "qf_code" INTEGER /* Code of the quality flag */,
  "qf_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES precipitation_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., weather station, satellite) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL or reference to the data source */,
  "data_source_api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "data_source_status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES precipitation_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality log */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality review was performed */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the quality review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "review_resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was resolved */,
  "review_action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken based on the review (e.g., data corrected, data confirmed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES precipitation_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the reviewer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the reviewer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the reviewer is affiliated with */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last review performed by the reviewer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the reviewer account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)
